message:
test(fp-conformance): wire DataFrameGroupByRolling* into run_fixture_operation

Adds the match arm for DataFrameGroupByRollingMean/Sum/Min/Max/Count
in run_fixture_operation so JSON fixture files carrying these ops
flow through the generic dispatcher instead of requiring the inlined
live-oracle tests to call execute_dataframe_groupby_rolling_fixture_operation
directly. Completes the plumbing started in de68f8b and 3771fd1
(br-frankenpandas-28y8, br-frankenpandas-339q).

Also reformats the single-line `.groupby(&groupby_refs)` call per
rustfmt default; no semantic change.

Tests: 5/5 live_oracle_dataframe_groupby_rolling_{mean,sum,min,max,count}_matches_pandas → pass under rch.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
